scripts.dev: concurrently -k --names coordinator,frontend --prefix-colors blue,green "bun run --filter coordinator dev" "bun run --filter frontend dev"
scripts.build: bun run --filter @cushion/types build && bun run --filter frontend build && bun run --filter coordinator build
scripts.lint: bun run --filter '*' lint && bun run lint:colors && bun run verify:pdfjs-assets
scripts.ci: bun run lint && bun run type-check && bun run test
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/.next apps/*/dist
